args: import { isAbsolute, join } from 'node:path'; import { pathToFileURL } from 'node:url'; const root = process.env.PLUGIN_ROOT; if (!root || !isAbsolute(root)) throw new Error('PLUGIN_ROOT must be absolute'); process.env.OH_MY_HARNESS_RUNTIME = 'codex'; await import(pathToFileURL(join(root, 'mcp/cli-tools-server.mjs')).href);
